reviews.comment:
Excelente atención por parte de todos, súper recomendable para cenar y dormir

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from everyone, highly recommended for dinner and accommodation

reviews.comment:
muy buena atención, muy serviciales, pocos playeros para semejante cantidad de autos

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, very helpful, few attendants for such a large number of cars
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5c1BfaFNREAE

reviews.comment:
Pésima atención, dos personas para una cantidad importante de autos, y la espera insoportable, perdí más de media hora esperando cuando en la isla que estaba cuando llegue habían 3 autos

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service, two people for a large number of cars, and the wait was unbearable. I wasted more than half an hour waiting when there were only 3 cars on the island I was on when I arrived.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5c04zT2dnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Cargué combustible y realicé compras en el servishop. Buena atención.

(Translated by Google)
I filled up with fuel and made some purchases at the service station. Good service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5c05HeWhnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy lindas cabañas. Con aire acondicionado ideal para la parada después de un largo viaje. Influyen desayuno

(Translated by Google)
Very nice cabins. With air conditioning, ideal for a stop after a long trip. Breakfast is included.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias por su calificación y comentario

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5MFBLNzVnRRAB

reviews.comment:
La atencion es lenta siempre hay cola de autos conviene seguir unos kilometros hasta la ypf siguiente pasamos el 31 y solo habia una persona atendiendo !!

(Translated by Google)
The service is slow, there's always a line of cars. It's better to continue a few kilometers to the next YPF station. We passed by on the 31st and there was only one person working!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5b05tTFdREAE

reviewReply.comment: Gracias por su calificación y comentario

reviews.comment:
Necesitaba alojarme para descansar luego de pasar la ruta del desierto y no disponen lugar para personas que viajan solas! Una verguenza!

(Translated by Google)
I needed a place to stay to rest after driving through the desert, and they don't have room for people traveling alone! Shame on you!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5d0luSjJRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención y servicio. Mejorar limpieza de baños. Cobran el agua caliente y el termotanque no te llena la totalidad del termo. Deberían ponerlo como un servicio gratuito.

(Translated by Google)
Good service and attention. Bathroom cleanliness needs improvement. They charge for hot water, and the water heater doesn't fill it completely. They should offer it as a free service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5d0lLQjZRRRAB

reviewReply.comment: Gracias por su calificación y comentario
